title: [MTR3/4] Metrô Rio CRRC 4000
description: This pack adds the Rio de Janeiro Metro CNR (CRRC) 4000 Series train via Minecraft Transit Railway that retextures the mod's default M-Train
body:
EN: This pack adds the Rio de Janeiro CNR (CRRC) 4000 Series train via Minecraft Transit Railway that retextures the mod's default M-Train

PT: Este pacote adiciona o trem da série 4000 da CNR (CRRC) do Rio de Janeiro através do Minecraft Transit Railway, que retexturiza o trem M-Train padrão do mod.

Credits: RJSkins for the door texture, FC for the thumbnail and Nøqzera for the head texture.
